title: [Fabric] CobblemonPlus
description: Cobblemon with AE2 & Create. Lots of terrain-generation. Light on tech, heavy on exploration!
body:
This is Cobblemon Plus for Fabric 1.20.1

This pack is focused around Cobblemon but includes other mods such as: 
- Applied Energistics 2 
- Artifacts 
- Better Combat
- Create 
- Dark Utilities
- Deep Mob Learning: Refabricated
- Lootr
- More Mobs
- Powah
- Trinkets

We also have focused a lot on terrain generation with Tectonic and Terralith, the full Yung suite and Towns & Towers! The pack is relatively light in tech mods as they're meant to be optional. Nothing is gated, and exploration is encouraged.

**Note: This pack is designed for single-player use or for you to upload and host as your own server. The included server is a private whitelist community which is invite-only and not available to the public. This can be ignored/deleted.**
